title: User
description: A Kinde user — an end-user account inside a Kinde business. Users can authenticate via multiple identities (email, phone, social, enterprise SSO) and belong to one or more organizations.

id.description: Globally unique Kinde-generated user id (e.g. kp_abc123).

provided_id.description: External id provided when creating the user.

preferred_email.description: Primary email address used for sign-in and notifications.

is_suspended.description: Whether the user has been suspended from signing in.

picture.description: URL of the user's profile picture.

organizations.description: List of organization codes the user belongs to.

identities.description: All identities (login methods) linked to the user.
